ModMetaData.name: QualityBuilder Unofficial 1.6
ModMetaData.description:
With QualityBuilder you are able to set a minimum quality you want on a Object you want to build. Tired of placing, deconstructing and replacing 100 of beds just to get some decent ones? This has an end now! You can set the minimum quality you want to get from you selected objects.
If the finished object does not met your minimum quality requirements, it will get deconstructed and replaced in same position and same stuff
Originally made by Hatti: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=754637870 I've been maintaining it since the original hasn't been updated in a while - updated it for 1.6, fixed a bug where reloading your save would unforbid your quality items, fixed a bug where deconstructing one of these buildings yourself could trigger an unwanted rebuild, added a limit so it won't burn all your resources forever if it can't hit your quality target, and added a skill-level slider for builders. Full list of changes on GitHub if you're curious: https://github.com/pkp24/QualityBuilder
Thanks to Ludeon Forum User 'g66mocv3' for Spanish and Spanish-Latin translation Steam User 'Sy1102', Id 76561198366004211 for Chinese traditional translation Steam User 'WexMan', Id 76561198018947335 for Russian translation
Claude Code used for the most recent complicated updates, many many hours testing it myself and since the recent changes I've seen 0 quality builder errors while playing.
